risk_description: Permit or STR eligibility issue delays launch
mitigation_plan: Complete legal research checklist and verify official sources
trigger_or_early_signal: Permit status unresolved within target launch window

risk_description: Cleaning turnover inconsistency impacts guest reviews
mitigation_plan: Use turnover quick checklist every stay and verify with photos

risk_description: Over-discounting reduces margin without occupancy gain
mitigation_plan: Apply 15 percent cap and weekly pricing review cadence

risk_description: Unexpected repair issue causes guest disruption
mitigation_plan: Run monthly maintenance quick pass and keep reserve budget
trigger_or_early_signal: Multiple repair tickets in same system within 30 days

risk_description: Slow booking pace in first 45 days
mitigation_plan: Use launch promo stack and optimize listing/photo quality
trigger_or_early_signal: Occupancy below target by more than 10 points for 2 weeks
notes: Escalate with controlled weekday rate adjustments
